meaning: vt.浠ュぇ鍐欏瓧姣嶅啓,鍙樻垚璧勬湰
examples: The team failed to capitalize on their early lead.
Our intention is to capitalize the company by any means we can.
Capitalize all proper nouns but not the articles (a, an) that precede them.
Not only do you have to understand this, but you also have to capitalize on it.
There are also a number of smaller firms looking to capitalize on the data explosion.
